What We Offer

Programs & Training

Structured preparation for all major Goa government examinations — completely free for every student.

1
Goa SSC
Complete guidance for Goa Staff Selection Commission — CBT 1 & 2, syllabus, mock tests and strategy for Group C & B posts.
2
GPSC
Focused preparation for Goa Public Service Commission — Group A & B Gazetted officer posts. Prelims, Mains and Interview preparation.
3
Government Recruitment
All government recruitment examinations covered with structured preparation, regular assessments and expert guidance.
4
Competitive Exams
Aptitude, reasoning, general knowledge, current affairs and Konkani language — essential for all Goa government exams.
5
Career Awareness
Understanding job levels, pay matrix, posts through GSSC vs GPSC, salary ranges and career growth in government service.
6
Mentorship & Motivation
Daily motivation, discipline building, study planning and personal guidance to keep students consistent and focused.
Daily Schedule

Our Purpose

Vision of the Initiative

Building educational opportunities that uplift the youth and community of Bicholim and Sattari talukas.

🌟
Support Ambitious Students
Empowering job aspirants from Bicholim and Sattari to compete for government positions with confidence.
📚
Quality Access for All
Quality competitive exam preparation for rural students — completely free, no barriers.
🏛
Government Careers
Encouraging careers in government and public service through structured awareness and guidance.
🌿
Community Growth
Building long-term educational opportunities that uplift the entire Bicholim region.
🎯
Disciplined Learning
Daily classes, regular tests, real results — a motivating and consistent learning environment.
🤝
Political–Academic Partnership
A model combining political sponsorship with academic expertise to serve local youth directly.

Join the ProgramIt's Completely Free

Daily classes 6:00 PM to 8:30 PM at Dr. Shetye Office, Mulgao, Bicholim. Open to all students. 250+ students already enrolled and attending regularly.
